channel.title: MeetJapan
channel.description: Calm, useful Japan travel guides for foreign visitors.

item.title: Mobile Suica Setup
item.description: A low-stress guide to using Mobile Suica in Japan.

item.title: Tax-Free Shopping Rules
item.description: What foreign travelers need to know before shopping tax-free in Japan.

item.title: ATM Guide For Foreign Cards
item.description: Where to start when you need cash in Japan.

item.title: Luggage Forwarding In Japan
item.description: Why luggage forwarding can make arrival days much easier.

item.title: Tattoo-Friendly Onsen Basics
item.description: A respectful guide to reducing anxiety around tattoo-friendly onsen.

item.title: Local vs Express Train Mistakes
item.description: How to avoid the most common beginner train mistake in Japan.

item.title: Don Quijote Survival Guide
item.description: How to enjoy Donki without getting overwhelmed.
